# Radha Nikunj Path

Radha Nikunj Path is a devotional companion for Jap, reflections, routine, and Shri Radha Naam remembrance.

This website includes:
- Home: app overview and Play Store download entry
- Docs: end-user guide for Naam Jap, Reflections, Routine, Jap Counter, Jap Reminders, Statistics, Monthly Recap, and Backup
- About: spiritual intent and purpose of the app
- Privacy Policy: data storage, reminders, and Google Drive backup policy
- Terms & Conditions: app use, local data, reminders, backup, privacy, and availability terms
- Contact: support and feedback links

Primary website:
https://radhanikunjpath.github.io/

Important URLs:
- https://radhanikunjpath.github.io/
- https://radhanikunjpath.github.io/docs
- https://radhanikunjpath.github.io/about
- https://radhanikunjpath.github.io/privacy-policy
- https://radhanikunjpath.github.io/terms-and-conditions
- https://radhanikunjpath.github.io/contact
